message.content:
Thoroughly review ALL backend source files in /home/user/Decode-App/src/ for bugs, type errors, logic errors, security issues, and runtime problems. Focus on:

1. src/routes.ts — check all API routes, parameter validation, SQL injection risks, error handling, clampLevel usage, UUID validation
2. src/index.ts — check CORS, middleware, static serving
3. src/types.ts — check type definitions
4. src/bigquery.ts — check BigQuery client setup

Report every bug you find with file path, line number, and description of the issue.

content.text: The model claude-sonnet-4-5@20250929 is not available on your vertex deployment. Try /model to switch to claude-sonnet-4@20250514, or ask your admin to enable this model.
